title: Login Issue - Cannot Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in despite using correct credentials.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Payment attempt failed even though customer confirms sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Download button for invoice is not responding.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Billing address shows outdated information after update.

title: App Crash on Android
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launch on Android devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Refund was requested two weeks ago but not yet received.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving OTP for login verification.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: Error appears while uploading new profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renew Disabled
description: Auto-renew option is turned off automatically.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer did not receive confirmation email after purchase.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Dashboard Loading Slowly
description: Customer dashboard takes too long to load.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Server error occurs during checkout process.

title: Language Change Not Saving
description: Selected language resets after page refresh.

title: Notification Settings Not Updating
description: Changes in notification preferences are not saved.
